signals.headline: What is confirmed:** The Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets 101-94 in Game 2 of the first-round playoffs, taking a 2-0
signals.raw: What is confirmed:** The Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets 101-94 in Game 2 of the first-round playoffs, taking a 2-0 series lead.[1][4] LeBron James led all scorers with 28 points, 8 rebounds, and 7 assists.[1] Luka Doncic is not expected to return during the first round due to a hamstring injury.[4]

signals.headline: ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET ACTIVITY | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
ELON MUSK TWEET COUNT MARKETS DOMINATE POLYMARKET ACTIVITY | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 20 - April 22, 2026?" (priced at 40-64% implied probability in one range) and "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" with 1120-1159 tweets at **18% chance**.[2][3][4]
